'''Mon Calamari Trader''' was a cargo [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|hovercraft]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to trade with various civilizations. It resembles an [https://starwars.fandom.com/wiki/MB-C1_medium_transport MB-C1 Medium Transport] if it were a repulsorcraft.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
